Matthew,

I reviewed your lab results from Tuesday. Your A1C has come up to 6.3, which is higher than the 6.1 we saw in October. Your fasting glucose at 118 is also elevated.

I would like to start you on metformin 500mg once daily with dinner. It is the standard first step for prediabetes management and most patients tolerate it well. We can go over side effects at your next visit.

I know you have your DOT physical coming up in June. Prediabetes does not disqualify you from your CDL at this time, but if your A1C crosses 6.5 at the next exam, that changes the picture. Starting metformin now gives us the best chance to keep your numbers stable before then.

YOUR 2025 SUMMARY
You had a net realized loss of $2,594.68 in 2025.

What this means for your taxes:
- Capital losses can offset capital gains from other investments
- Up to $3,000 in net capital losses can be deducted against ordinary income
- Unused losses carry forward to future tax years

FORMS YOU MAY NEED
- Form 8949: Reports each individual crypto transaction
- Schedule D: Summarizes your total gains and losses
- Your Coinbase Gain/Loss Report has the data you need to complete these forms
